title: 📊 Model Performance Update – 4,795 Points Captured
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
**Model Performance Update** 

Just wanted to share another live trade result from my automated intraday model.

* **Entry:** 02/10/2025 (UTC+0) Closing
* **Exit:** 05/10/2025 (UTC+0) Closing
* **Entry Price:** 118,655
* **Exit Price:** 123,450

This trade locked in **+4,795 points** profit.

Like I’ve said before, not every trade is a home run, but the model’s been consistent. On average it generates around **5,000–5,500 points a month**, and over the past three years it’s outperformed BTC spot and never closed a quarter in loss.

September alone made us \~15,000 points....  
And first trade of October closed in 4,795 points profit.....

Here are the models stats of back test data excluding September, [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yZGuFUf8XecgE2kel1zahbt6JrvzUeBR5LrxyOvYOyg/edit?usp=drive\_link](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yZGuFUf8XecgE2kel1zahbt6JrvzUeBR5LrxyOvYOyg/edit?usp=drive_link)

I’m currently lending access to this model. Anyone curious about some basic questions on how it works can drop a comment or message me. Happy to answer questions.
